title: Destination Resort Kandaghat
description: A luxury destination resort nestled in the hills of Kandaghat, featuring contemporary architecture blended with traditional Himachali design elements.

title: De-Exotica Resort at Theog Shimla
description: The resort on the hilltop offers a 360-degree view. It accommodates 3 cottages, 40 deluxe rooms, a restaurant, banquet hall, conference hall, swimming pool, terrace, and lawn with an apple orchard.

title: Radisson Sadhupul
description: A resort spanning 10,400 sq.m emphasizing optimal use of natural terrain and unobstructed views from all rooms. Features two interconnected blocks with dining, spa, swimming pool, and recreational areas.

title: Sacred Heart Convent School
description: Designed on a challenging terrain, the school complex has three building blocks and playground integrated with terrace. It consists of 40 classrooms, modern labs and an auditorium with 1500 seating capacity.

title: Saraswati Paradise International Public School
description: A five-storied co-educational English medium school with 28 classrooms, modern laboratories, library, dance room, and auditorium. Features gharsa slate cladding and brick pillars complementing the natural terrain.

title: Belvedere Auckland House School
description: Building designed in colonial style with 24 classrooms, play field and auditorium in the heart of Shimla. Features machine-made brick facades with arches, circular windows, and wooden finishes.

title: Saanjh — The Musical Sunset
description: A 320 sq.m residential project in Mashobra hills, functioning as a bed and breakfast. Features a blend of sustainable materials including wood, stone, concrete, and cane with warm tones throughout.

title: Man Pasand Cottage
description: A 3,000 sq.m colonial-style residence featuring 3 bedrooms, drawing and dining room, kitchen, gym in attic floor. Incorporates local mandi stone exteriors, gothic-style windows, spa, and expansive lawn.

title: Manish Khera Residence
description: A residential villa on a raised plateau offering 360-degree views with forest surroundings. Features an octagonal drawing room capturing panoramic vistas and a lift connecting road-level parking.

title: Parkwood Estate at Koti, Shimla
description: Award-winning residential complex featuring 6 villas and 18 apartments with sustainable design principles. Incorporates vernacular architecture using reclaimed railway sleepers and green building materials.

title: Ranjan Chauhan Building
description: A residential complex containing 6 2BHK apartments in Purani Koti, Mashobra. Features south-facing orientation for solar efficiency, solar heating systems, and gharsa stone cladding.

title: Commercial Building of Prakash Dogra
description: A five-storied building at Bhattakuffar featuring commercial spaces, parking, guest rooms, and a banquet hall. Its distinctive curvilinear exterior with circular corners utilizes large toughened glass and ACP sheet finishes.

title: Office Complex of SJVNL
description: A 3,700 sq.m corporate office featuring traditional katha-kuni style of architecture with stepped masses, two landscaped courtyards, and design elements complementing the natural surroundings.

title: Rajiv Gandhi Bhawan
description: A five-story structure serving as the HP State Congress Committee party office. Features party offices, meeting rooms, and a conference hall designed with RCC slabs over steel trusses.

title: Guthan Temple
description: Reconstruction of a temple complex in Theog tehsil using Katha Kuni style, a traditional wood-stone framework technique providing seismic resilience while preserving vernacular building practices.

title: Himachal Theme — Suraj Kund Mela
description: A temporary architectural installation completed in 45 days. Includes a traditional Himachal-style entry gate, a replica of Bhimakali Temple Sarahan in Katha kuni style, and traditional Himachal houses.
